---
title: "Filter"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(haven) 
library(tidyverse) 
library(clean) 
library(labelled) 
library(Hmisc) 

df <- read_sav('/Users/joecrowley/R/Data/BSA Teaching Data/spss/spss25/bsa2019_poverty_open.sav', user_na = T)

```

<br> 

## Basic filtering

```{r}

df %>% filter(PartyId2 == 1) %>% count(PartyId2)

```

## Filtering conditions using many variables

```{r}

names(df)
grep("rsex", names(df), ignore.case = T, value = T)

df %>% 
  filter(if_any(ends_with("Rsex"), ~ . > 1)) %>% # Women only
  count(RSex)

```


```{r}

names(df) # RSex and RAgeCat occur right after each other

df %>% 
  filter(if_all(RSex:RAgeCat, ~ . > 1)) %>% # Womeny older than 24
  count(RSex, RAgeCat)

```
